middleware.description: Rate limits the two write endpoints that dispatch external side-effects: POST /health-checks/{h}/run + POST /providers/{p}/test. Prevents test spam that would DDoS the tenant's own infrastructure OR the tenant's monitoring provider. Default: 1 request per (route, resource_id) per 60s. Response includes Retry-After header on 429.

consumed.note: Applied per-route with the specific entitlement key (monitoring_capture for base surface, monitoring_paging / monitoring_apm / monitoring_prometheus for advanced provider routes, monitoring_custom_metrics for custom_script / custom_metric routes).
Permission-based authorize middleware wraps the ability checks defined in policies.json + permissions.json.
